blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and edges are well-defined, indicating no blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots are present that obscure text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations are present.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears, creases, or folds are visible.

cut_off_detection.description: No document edges are cut off, and the image frame includes all relevant portions.

missing_sections.description: All sections of the receipt/invoice are present and complete.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements obscure the document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumer, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, and item description. It is a detailed invoice for telecommunications services.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 7 out of 8 required fields, confirming it as an expense document.

line_items.description: TRIO NET SUPER RELAX + TV + MOBILE
Réduction de 15 EUR pendant 12 mois sur les abonnements

extraction.special_notes: Cette facture ne permet pas de déduire la tva. Si vous utilisez le service à des fins professionnelles rendez-vous sur notre site internet ou contactez notre service clientèle au 078/50.50.50.
extraction.business_registration_number: RPM Liège - Belfius - IBAN : BE06 0960 1782 8722 - BIC : GKCCBEBB - TVA : BE0696.668.549

issues.description: The receipt does not include the purchaser details as required by the compliance standards.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Invoices must include the purchaser details

issues.description: The tax amount is missing from the receipt, which is a mandatory requirement according to the compliance standards.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: VAT amount must be listed clearly on the invoice if applicable

issues.description: The receipt does not include the business purpose and manager approval as required by the compliance policies.
issues.recommendation: Please provide the business purpose and obtain manager approval before submission.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Business purpose must be established and clearly documented for all expenses. Employee's line manager approval required before payroll cutoff date.

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has several compliance issues including missing purchaser details, missing tax amount, and lack of business purpose and manager approval. These issues need to be addressed to ensure compliance with the specified standards and policies.
